iotwireless.multicastgroup.AssociateWire.Docs: The ID of the wireless device to associate with a multicast group.

iotwireless.multicastgroup.Description.Docs: The description of the multicast group.

iotwireless.multicastgroup.DisassociateW.Docs: The ID of the wireless device to disassociate from a multicast group.

iotwireless.multicastgroup.LoRaWAN.Docs: The LoRaWAN information that is to be used with the multicast group.

iotwireless.multicastgroup.Name.Docs: The name of the multicast group.

iotwireless.multicastgroup.Tags.Docs: The tags are an array of key-value pairs to attach to the specified resource. Tags can have a minimum of 0 and a maximum of 50 items.
